person.name: Adele de Coucy
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Adèle (Ada) de Marle, the divorced wife of Aubry, Viscount of Coucy, and daughter of Letard de Roucy, Lord of Marle. Letard was, in turn, the son of Gilbert, Count of Reims and Roucy.


«b»Biography«/b»
Létaud & his wife had one child: 1. ADA de Marle . Elinand Bishop of Laon donations made by "Albricus de Cociaco castro…cum uxore sua Adela et matre eius Malthilde" by charter dated 3 Nov 1059. Her parentage and second marriage are indicated by the Genealogiæ Scriptoris Fusniacensis which names "Letaldus de Marla…filiam nomine Adam" as mother of "Thomam de Marla", read together with the sources which indicate that Thomas was the son of Enguerrand [I] de Bove Comte d'Amiens. The Chronicle of Alberic de Trois-Fontaines names "filia…Letardi domni de Marla…Ada" as mother of "Thomam de Cocy". It is assumed that "Adela" in the first source is the same person as "Ada" in the second and third sources, but this is not beyond all doubt. [Heiress of Coucy]: as Coucy passed from her first husband to her second husband, it is supposed that Ada was heiress of Coucy, although no primary source has yet been identified which confirms that this speculation is correct. m firstly (divorced 1059) AUBRY [de Beaumont-sur-Oise] Vicomte de Coucy, son of [IVES [I] Comte de Beaumont & his wife Emma ---] (-before 1095). m secondly (repudiated) as his first wife, ENGUERRAND [I] Comte d'Amiens Seigneur de Boves et de Coucy, son of DREUX Seigneur de Boves & his wife --- (-[1117]).

m firstly (divorced 1059) AUBRY [de Beaumont-sur-Oise] Vicomte de Coucy, son of [IVES [I] Comte de Beaumont & his wife Emma ---] (-before 1095). m secondly (repudiated) as his first wife, ENGUERRAND [I] Comte d'Amiens Seigneur de Boves et de Coucy, son of DREUX Seigneur de Boves & his wife --- (-[1117]).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adele de Coucy於大約1049年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，她的父親Wallerand DE COUCY40歲，母親Emma DE THOUROTTE33歲。她和Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1106年在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯庫希享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Adele de Coucy was born about 1049, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Wallerand DE COUCY, was 40 and her mother, Emma DE THOUROTTE, was 33. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves. She died in 1106, in Coucy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adele de Coucy est née environ 1049, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Wallerand DE COUCY, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Emma DE THOUROTTE, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves. Elle est décédée en 1106, à Coucy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adele de Coucy um 1049 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wallerand DE COUCY 40 und ihre Mutter Emma DE THOUROTTE 33. Sie hatte mit Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1106 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Coucy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Coucy è nata il circa 1049 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Wallerand DE COUCY, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Emma DE THOUROTTE, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves. Morì nel 1106, nel Coucy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adele de Coucy(이)가 대략 1049년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wallerand DE COUCY(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma DE THOUROTTE(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1106년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 코우시에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Coucy nasceu aproximadamente 1049, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Wallerand DE COUCY, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Emma DE THOUROTTE, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves. Ela faleceu em 1106, em Coucy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adele de Coucy родилась около 1049 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Wallerand DE COUCY было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma DE THOUROTTE, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves. Она умерла в 1106 г. в местности коуси, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adele de Coucy nació aproximadamente 1049, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Wallerand DE COUCY, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Emma DE THOUROTTE, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves. Murió en 1106, en Coucy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
